mushrooms/deadpeople - Meredith Bull

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

It wasn’t like Soap was ashamed of himself. He just didn’t think anyone needed to know every bit of him, that’s all. He told himself he didn’t care if the other men found anything out. It didn’t make him any less of a man, after all.

Still, he didn’t use the locker rooms for a reason. He just walked back to his barracks in his sweaty gym clothes and changed in the privacy of his quarters. His scars were pretty well hidden by his chest hair but they were still there and still damning, so he just played it safe. No one had ever questioned it, and if they had, they knew better than to confront him outright.

It wasn’t even an issue. It hadn’t been an issue until Thursday, when he was running late for a meeting he’d entirely forgotten about. His phone chimed the alert in the
